name: Hydrogen Bomb of Instant AIDS
author: concavz
bootlegger: If the Plague Doctor dies, that night, everybody alive gains the same Minion ability, until dusk.
(Optional) If there are 5 or more players alive & the Demon dies, only one player with the Scarlet Woman ability will become the Demon.
If a good player with the Scarlet Woman ability becomes the Demon, they become evil.

If the Plague Doctor dies, each player who gets the Boffin ability might give the Demon a different good character's ability (not necessarily out of play). They only learn the ability that they themselves gave to the Demon.

Legion might gain the Boffin ability. If so, one member of Legion learns what the ability is, and who has it. I humbly beg of you, please just give them Alchemist! (Boffin/Drunk jinx does not apply if in a Legion world.)
If the Slayer shoots themselves, they might register as the Demon.
